cases.prompt: Investigate the ROS 2 / Fast DDS Reliability QoS implementation. Trace the policy from rclcpp QoS through rmw_fastrtps into Fast DDS RTPS behavior, then prepare a report for discussion.

For a ROS 2 zero-copy project, check whether Reliable QoS takes the same path for network RTPS, Fast DDS DataSharing, and intra-process delivery. I need an implementation-based report and discussion packet.
expected_evidence: Source trace for each scoped path

cases.prompt: This ROS 2 node deadlocks when a callback calls a service synchronously. Review executor and callback group choices; QoS is not part of the question.
Messages are sometimes missing in production after a recent change. Reproduce the failure, capture evidence, and identify the root cause before changing QoS settings.
Before submission, check whether all required evidence is present and decide submit or no-submit.
